title: euonymus subcordatus
intro: Euonymus subcordatus, also known as the Chinese spindle tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to China and Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from fever and headache. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
